reviews.comment: Although it is the only place to fill your tank in the area, they don't overcharge you. The location is just unreal.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) A very good and necessary place, because when the border crossing to Chile is closed, this is where people can stay in a clean, air-conditioned environment with Wi-Fi, snacks, and coffee. They also offer lodging.

(Original)
Local muito bom e necessário, pois quando não abre a entrada para o Chile, este é o local onde as pessoas podem ficar com um ambiente climatizado e limpo, com wi-fi, lanches e cafés.  Além disso tem hospedagem também.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVXzY3U21nRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) In the middle of nowhere, inhospitable. A perfect shelter.

(Original)
No meio do nada, inóspito. Um abrigo perfeito.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVZ3UyMWJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Parada casi obligada cuando se viaja a Chile, más si se quiere viajar con tanque lleno o se vuelve a Argentina con lo justo. Buenas instalaciones, atención también buena, variedad de opciones para comprar, y limpieza en los baños.

(Translated by Google)
An almost obligatory stop when traveling to Chile, especially if you want to travel with a full tank of gas or return to Argentina with just enough fuel. Good facilities, equally good service, a variety of shopping options, and clean bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVcUphUFhBEAE
